title: An Act to Lower Electricity Costs by Repealing the Laws Governing Net Energy Billing
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 22, 2025
last_house_action: 3/21/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
last_senate_action: 4/22/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on Energy, Utilities and Technology suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY in concurrence
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
